examples: But netminder Jody Lehman, in his first World Championships, was once again in fantastic form as he stopped 31 shots.
Giants netminder Stephen Murphy was in superb form, making 38 saves to put his side in a position to win.
Player-coach Wayne Slater ghosted in from the opponent's blue line, and hit a powerful slapshot straight past the motionless Nottingham netminder.
